commands.review_summary:
The PR adds QQBot outbound text sanitization via `sanitizeAssistantVisibleText` and a regression test for stripping reasoning tags.

PR surface: Source +2, Tests +17. Total +19 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. by source inspection: current main's QQBot outbound adapter lacks `sanitizeText`, and shared delivery only invokes sanitization when that hook exists. I did not live-reproduce the Tencent QQBot plus MiniMax-M3 path in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - No automated repair is needed; the PR is already a narrow maintainer-authored fix with no blocking review findings.

target.title: fix(qqbot): sanitize outbound text to strip reasoning/thinking content
target.body:
### Summary

- QQBot's `outbound` descriptor lacked a `sanitizeText` hook; the shared delivery layer only applies sanitization when the channel provides one
- Without it, models emitting reasoning content (e.g. MiniMax-M3 with explicit thinking via `anthropic-messages` API) leak `<thinking>` blocks as user-visible text
- Fix: wire `sanitizeAssistantVisibleText` (the canonical "delivery"-profile sanitizer) as QQBot's `sanitizeText` hook; this strips `<thinking>`, `<think>`, `<thought>`, tool-call scaffolding, and internal trace lines before native platform send

### Real behavior proof

**Behavior addressed:** QQBot users with MiniMax-M3 (`minimax/MiniMax-M3` via `anthropic-messages` API) receiving raw reasoning/self-narration text in replies after upgrading to OpenClaw 2026.5.28.

**Real environment tested:** Source-trace confirmed: `extensions/qqbot/src/channel.ts` outbound descriptor has no `sanitizeText` field; `src/infra/outbound/deliver.ts:386` only builds the sanitizer when the channel provides `sanitizeText`; `src/llm/providers/stream-wrappers/minimax.ts` documents that reasoning_content leaks as visible content when thinking is explicitly set.

**Exact steps or command run after this patch:** `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/qqbot/src/channel.message-adapter.test.ts`

**Evidence after fix:** 2 tests passed (0 failures); new regression test verifies `<thinking>` and `<think>` tag stripping end-to-end through the `sanitizeText` hook.

**Observed result after fix:** `sanitizeText({ text: "<thinking>internal reasoning</thinking>final answer", payload: { text: ... } })` returns `"final answer"`.

**What was not tested:** Live QQBot + MiniMax-M3 end-to-end Tencent platform send (not feasible in read-only source review).

### Reproduction

1. Configure MiniMax-M3 (`minimax/MiniMax-M3`) via `anthropic-messages` API with explicit thinking enabled
2. Send a message via QQBot DM or group
3. **Before this PR:** Model reasoning content (`<thinking>…</thinking>` or raw reasoning_content text) appears in the QQBot reply
4. **After this PR:** Only the final answer text is sent to QQBot; reasoning content is stripped by the sanitizer before platform send

### Risk / Mitigation

- Low risk: change adds a new sanitization pass that does not alter the delivery path or any config surface
- The "delivery" profile of `sanitizeAssistantVisibleText` is the same sanitizer used by sibling channels; behavior is well-tested upstream

### Change Type (select all)

- [x] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Tests only
- [ ] Documentation

### Scope (select all touched areas)

- [x] extensions/qqbot

### Linked Issue/PR

Fixes #89913
